calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-18-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Simon for and with Timothy Tikker (appeared by telephone).

The Court noted that the 13100 declaration is not accompanied by a certified copy of the death certificate. Mr. Simon stated that his understanding as that the death certified is in the Court's file. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is under submission subject to review of the order and receiving a certified copy of the death certificate which is to be filed this week.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Siu. Not reported.
